title: alansmia elastica
intro: Alansmia elastica, also known as Resurrection Plant, is a fascinating species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of fern that has the unique ability to dry out and roll up its leaves to conserve water, allowing it to 'resurrect' itself when water becomes available. The medicinal properties of Alansmia elastica include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its rich composition of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, and herbal preparations often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the leaves or stems of the plant.
